channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Taylor Swift Pays Over $160,000 for NYC Permit to Host MSG Wedding
item.description: New York City mayor Zohran Mamdani has confirmed that Taylor Swift and her husband Travis Kelce paid over $160,000 (£119,000) to secure a permit for their high-profile wedding at Madison Square Garden...

item.title: Rock City Festival 2026 Boosts Arts, Sports, and Tourism in Lake Zone
item.description: The Rock City 2026 festival, set to run from August to December in Mwanza, aims to showcase youth talent and boost economic development in Tanzania’s Lake Zone. Organized by Feyfay Investment, the eve...

item.title: Lorry Collision Kills Two at Kisii Petrol Station
item.description: A tragic incident occurred on Sunday morning when a lorry lost control and crashed into eight parked trucks at Tosha Petrol Station along Kisii-Keroka Road. The collision, which happened around 4:30am...

item.title: NEMC takes legal action against 27 businesses for environmental violations
item.description: The National Environment Management Council (NEMC) has initiated legal proceedings against 27 businesses and mining operations in the Eastern Lake Victoria Zone for breaching environmental regulations...

item.title: President Ramaphosa Honors 110th Anniversary of Delville Wood Battle
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa is set to attend the 110th commemoration of the Battle of Delville Wood at the South African Memorial in Longueval, France. This event marks a significant historical mileston...

item.title: Venomous Snakes Escape into City Amid Floods Caused by Typhoon Maysak
item.description: Residents in Hengzhou, southern China, are facing a terrifying situation after around 900 venomous snakes escaped into nearby communities following devastating floods caused by Typhoon Maysak. The sna...

item.title: Peller & Jarvis Announce August 1 Wedding, Unveil ₦1 Million Aso Ebi Package
item.description: Peller and Jarvis have officially announced their white wedding date as August 1, 2026, with the ceremony expected to be one of the most-watched influencer weddings in Nigeria this year. The couple re...

item.title: Lindsey Graham Dies from Sudden Illness; Trump Reacts with Tributes
item.description: U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham died on Saturday night at age 71 from a 'brief and sudden illness,' according to his office. Emergency responders were called to his Capitol Hill home after reports of card...

item.title: DRC Files New Genocide Case Against Rwanda at International Court of Justice
item.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) has filed a third lawsuit against Rwanda at the International Court of Justice (ICJ), alleging genocide and atrocity crimes by Rwandan forces since 1996. This ca...

item.title: Alfred Vargas and Wife Yasmine to Pursue Legal Action Against Rob Sy
item.description: Alfred Vargas and his wife Yasmine have decided to escalate their legal dispute against Rob Sy by filing a formal case with the Department of Justice. The couple, known for their public advocacy, stat...

item.title: Court Finds Enyobeni Tavern Owners Liable for 21 Teenager Deaths
item.description: Four years after 21 teenagers died at Enyobeni Tavern in KuGompo City, a court has ruled that the owners were grossly negligent for failing to comply with liquor laws. Despite the ruling, owner Siyakh...

item.title: Iran Claims Targeting U.S. Aircraft Carrier's Logistics Hub In Oman
item.description: Iran has claimed to have targeted a logistics support hub of a U.S. aircraft carrier in Oman, escalating tensions between the two nations. The attack comes amid ongoing disputes over Iran's activities...

item.title: Government Announces Landowner Compensation Plan for Nithi River Bridge Realignment
item.description: The National Land Commission has officially published the names of over 100 landowners whose properties will be affected by the proposed realignment of the Nithi River Bridge along the Makutano-Embu-M...

item.title: Southern Manitoba Faces Unusual Storms Linked to Climate Change Trends
item.description: Over the past month, southern Manitoba has experienced a series of intense storms that have caused significant damage and disruption. The article explores the reasons behind these extreme weather even...

item.title: Queensland woman's ex-partner charged with murder after body discovered
item.description: A 30-year-old mother, Jana Armstrong, was found dead in bushland near Toowoomba, Queensland, after being missing for four days. Wildlife hunters discovered what police believe to be her remains, promp...

item.title: Strawberry Season Expands Across Northern Ontario
item.description: The strawberry season is experiencing a significant surge across Northern Ontario, with local farms and communities preparing for a bountiful harvest. This annual event not only supports regional agri...

item.title: Springboks coach Rassie Erasmus targets experienced squad for Wales clash after Scotland victory
item.description: Head coach Rassie Erasmus has confirmed that Sacha Feinberg-Mngomezulu may return in time for the Springboks' Test against Argentina in August, following their 42-28 victory over Scotland. Erasmus emp...

item.title: Pharmacy fees and profits: Calls for reform amid rising costs
item.description: The article highlights concerns over escalating pharmacy dispensing fees in Australia, despite advancements in electronic prescribing and automation. It notes that government fees for dispensing scrip...

item.title: AIIMS Report Confirms Gym Belt Matched Skin Tissues in Twisha Sharma Case
item.description: The AIIMS medical board conducted a second postmortem in the Twisha Sharma case, confirming that skin tissues found on a gymnastics belt with a metal ring matched the injuries on her neck. This forens...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial: Prosecution Seeks Her Appearance
item.description: The House prosecution panel is seeking Vice President Sara Duterte's appearance in her impeachment trial to address allegations against her. Representative Ysabel Maria Jorge Zamora-Jornada, a member ...
